name: Industrial Europe Flyover
description: Multi-spectral pass over the industrial heart of Europe, June 25, 2024.

system_prompts.terrain: Classify this satellite image: percentages of urban, vegetation, water body. Output ONLY JSON: {"classification": {"urban": float, "vegetation": float, "water body": float}}
system_prompts.methane: Detect methane plume sources in urban/industrial areas. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.fire_risk: Detect fire hotspots in agricultural/forest areas. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.oil_spill: Detect oil spills on water bodies. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
